questions.answer_latex: a + b \geq 2\sqrt{ab},\; b + c \geq 2\sqrt{bc},\; c + a \geq 2\sqrt{ca}; \text{ multiply: } (a+b)(b+c)(c+a) \geq 8\sqrt{a^2 b^2 c^2} = 8 abc; \text{ equality iff } a = b = c.
questions.answer_plain: Product of three 2-term AM-GMs; equality iff a=b=c.
